bug.description: signed/unsigned integer comparison mismatch leading to incorrect branch

prompt:
There is a signed/unsigned integer comparison mismatch leading to incorrect branch downstream of function send_mac_subframe_indications in the nfapi/open-nFAPI/vnf subsystem.
The function is located at nfapi/open-nFAPI/vnf/src/vnf_p7.c:446.
Please investigate and fix this issue.
